name: motion-expert-team
summary: Purposeful, production-safe UI motion expert for CSS, Motion/Framer, GSAP, Lottie, scroll-driven animation, accessibility, and performance review.

capability_modules.name: motion-direction
capability_modules.role: Motion intent, emotional semantics, choreography, timing, and easing philosophy.

capability_modules.name: ui-animation-implementation
capability_modules.role: UI implementation rules for CSS, Motion/Framer, springs, gestures, accessibility, and interaction behavior.

capability_modules.name: scroll-animation-patterns
capability_modules.role: Scroll animation patterns for GSAP ScrollTrigger and Motion/Framer.

capability_modules.name: gsap-animation-expertise
capability_modules.role: GSAP API, timelines, ScrollTrigger, plugins, React cleanup, and performance guidance.

capability_modules.name: motion-performance-review
capability_modules.role: Performance review, layout thrashing prevention, compositor boundaries, paint/layout risk, and reduced-motion safety.
